title: viola sylvestris var. ovato-oblonga
intro: Viola sylvestris var. ovato-oblonga, also known as a type of wild pansy, is a plant species that belongs to the viola genus and is characterized by its heart-shaped leaves and purple flowers. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Viola sylvestris var. ovato-oblonga include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal properties.
